productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed Purple Tshirts
description: Composition Purple round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front  Fitting Regular   Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron do not iron directly on print This T-shirt from united colors of benetton pays tribute to the biker lover in you with its calligraphic print. Turning conventional style on its head with its vintage print and modern design, this tee is a must-have. Pair it with distressed jeans and bright flip flops to tap into the label's funky aesthetic.  Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8' and chest 33"
